description: TOFU headless CMS guide

input.title: What is Headless CMS? A Complete Guide
input.textSnippet: A headless CMS is a content management system that separates the content repository from the presentation layer.

description: Personalization product page

input.title: Contentful Personalization
input.textSnippet: Deliver personalized experiences to every visitor. Powered by Ninetailed technology, Contentful Personalization lets you run A/B tests, multivariate experiments, and targeted audience segments. Define your audiences using behavioral signals, firmographic data, and real-time attributes. Connect personalization logic directly to your Contentful content model without engineering overhead. Enterprise teams use Contentful Personalization to increase conversion rates and improve customer engagement across channels. See how leading brands use Contentful Personalization at scale. Personalization rules are defined in the Contentful web app without code changes. Changes propagate instantly via the Content Delivery API. Request a demo to see Contentful Personalization in action with your own content. Our team will walk you through audience targeting, experimentation, and analytics. Contact sales for enterprise plans and volume pricing.

description: French language detection

input.title: Qu'est-ce qu'un CMS headless?
input.textSnippet: Un CMS headless est un système de gestion de contenu qui sépare le contenu de la présentation. Contrairement aux CMS traditionnels, le CMS headless livre le contenu via des API. Les équipes peuvent créer des expériences numériques sur tous les canaux.

description: Case study: speaker title in quote zone must not leak into jobFunction

input.title: How ACME Corp Scaled Content with Contentful
input.textSnippet:
[ZONE:hero] Platform Page: Hero
ACME Corp modernized their digital experience platform with Contentful.

[ZONE:quote] Customer Quote
Contentful gave our team the freedom to move fast. — Jane Smith, VP Engineering at ACME Corp

[ZONE:cta] CTA: Contact Sales
Ready to transform your digital experience? Contact sales.

expectedSignals.note: jobFunction must derive from hero audience framing, not speaker zone VP Engineering title

description: Product page: footer logos must not inflate industry beyond hero vertical framing

input.title: Contentful for Retail
input.textSnippet:
[ZONE:hero] Solutions Hero
Deliver personalized shopping experiences at scale with Contentful.

[ZONE:body] Features
Connects with your existing ecommerce stack.

[ZONE:footer] Footer
Trusted by Adobe, Salesforce, Microsoft, SAP, IBM, Oracle, and 3000+ enterprises.

expectedSignals.note: industry must derive from hero vertical framing (Retail & ecommerce), footer logo list must be suppressed
